summary: The legal decimal value is at most 10^12 and therefore produces at most ten hexadecimal digits, which is too small for an honest runtime scaling regression.

workload_bound.source_constraint: num represents an integer from 1 through 10^12

replacement_checks.evidence: Because 16^9 is below 10^12 and 16^10 is above it, every legal value has at most ten hexadecimal digits.
Regression compares an independent hexadecimal oracle across 1 through 4096, powers of sixteen, pronounceable forms, and the 10^12 boundary.
